vulnerability.reference: Designers rapidly integrate AI-generated images into professional work without scrutinizing representational biases.
vulnerability.generated: Designers lack visibility into token discretization errors, leaving semantic distortion undetected before final output.

impact.reference: Biased and stereotyped visuals from content misrepresentation perpetuate harmful societal narratives.
impact.generated: Finished creative works contain visual inaccuracies, eroding client trust and forcing costly redesigns.

dose_response.reference: In content generation via auto-encoding morph-tokens, lossy compression distorts visual concepts, causing designers to integrate biased outputs without scrutiny, perpetuating harmful stereotypes.
dose_response.generated: Lossy compression of visual features via auto-encoded morph-tokens, through designers' use of AI text-to-image tools, triggers undetected semantic distortion due to limited visibility into token discretization errors, leading to visual inaccuracies in finished creative works, eroding client trust and forcing costly redesigns.
